title: SoulSearch
description: A high-performance Terminal User Interface (TUI) for the Soulseek P2P network. Built with Node.js, React (Ink), and slsk-client. Features include audio-only filtering, Discogs/YouTube integration, auto-conversion to CDJ-compatible formats, and spectral analysis to detect fake bitrates.

title: Credit Default Prediction
description: This study researches the performance of hybrid models in predicting credit default. By combining XGBoost and Random Forest in a two-stage ensemble, leveraging their combined strengths in predictive power and reliability when using imbalanced data, the hybrid model demonstrated a 3.6% improvement compared to the best performing individual models.

title: Event Logo Development
description: Logo development project for a party event. Explored various design options and iterations to create a unique and memorable visual identity. The project involved experimenting with different styles, effects, and color schemes to achieve the perfect look for the event branding.

title: Meta Markets
description: Meta-Market is a tribute to the workers who bring Hong Kong to life through its wet markets. As a vegetarian outsider, I moved through stalls of meat and fish to document the vendors the city depends upon, capturing brief moments of connection with those who welcomed my camera. Inspired by Ken Kitano, I created 'meta-portraits' by layering images of vendors, customers, and products from Lok Fu, Shek Kip Mei, and Pei Ho to represent the density and rhythm of market life.
